name: Allie Chronobeauty Gel UV EX Chiikawaデザイン
pros: 90g size offers excellent value per gram versus competitors
Gel texture spreads smoothly without white cast
Cute Chiikawacharacter design appeals to local culture fans
cons: Zero Rakuten reviews suggest new/niche SKU with unproven track record
Character-limited edition may discontinue without warning
shortDescription: Lightweight gel sunscreen with Chiikawadesign in a generous 90g size.
review: This is a character-edition variant of Allie's established Chronobeauty line, so the formula itself is solid. However, the complete lack of reviews is a red flag for foreigners—you're essentially beta-testing. Stick with the standard Chronobeauty line if you want proven feedback, or buy this only if you're already loyal to Allie and love the design.
